nasb.text: As they gather silver and bronze and iron and lead and tin into the furnace to blow fire on it in order to melt it, so I will gather you in My anger and in My wrath and I will lay you there and melt you.

esv.text: As one gathers silver and bronze and iron and lead and tin into a furnace, to blow the fire on it in order to melt it, so I will gather you in my anger and in my wrath, and I will put you in and melt you.

cnv.text: 人怎樣把銀、銅、鐵、鉛、錫，集合在爐中，吹火使它們熔化，我也照樣在我的怒氣、我的烈怒中，把你們集合起來，放在城中，使你們熔化。

ccb.text: 我要在烈怒中把你们聚集在城里熔化，就像人把银、铜、铁、铅、锡聚在高温的炉中熔化一样。
